scripts.build:hooks-post-tool-linter: cd src/hooks-post-tool-linter && cargo build --release && cp target/release/hooks-post-tool-linter.exe ../../.claude/hooks-post-tool-linter.exe
scripts.build:hooks-stop-quality: cd src/hooks-stop-quality && cargo build --release && cp target/release/hooks-stop-quality.exe ../../.claude/hooks-stop-quality.exe
scripts.build:cli-push-runner: cd src/cli-push-runner && cargo build --release && cp target/release/cli-push-runner.exe ../../.claude/cli-push-runner.exe
scripts.build:cli-pr-monitor: cd src/cli-pr-monitor && cargo build --release && cp target/release/cli-pr-monitor.exe ../../.claude/cli-pr-monitor.exe
scripts.build:check-ci-coderabbit: cd src/check-ci-coderabbit && cargo build --release && cp target/release/check-ci-coderabbit.exe ../../.claude/check-ci-coderabbit.exe
scripts.build:hooks-session-start: cd src/hooks-session-start && cargo build --release && cp target/release/hooks-session-start.exe ../../.claude/hooks-session-start.exe
scripts.build:cli-merge-pipeline: cd src/cli-merge-pipeline && cargo build --release && cp target/release/cli-merge-pipeline.exe ../../.claude/cli-merge-pipeline.exe
scripts.build:all: pnpm build:hooks-session-start && pnpm build:hooks-pre-tool-validate && pnpm build:hooks-post-tool-linter && pnpm build:hooks-stop-quality && pnpm build:cli-push-runner && pnpm build:cli-pr-monitor && pnpm build:cli-merge-pipeline && pnpm build:check-ci-coderabbit && pnpm build:hooks-settings
scripts.py-test:e2e: echo py-test:e2e placeholder && python -c "print('E2E smoke test passed')"
